flow: feature/obsidian-knowledge-vault -> develop -> release/v5.7.0 -> uat + develop -> publish.sh (develop->main, strip docs+memory, public release/main, tag both, gh release) -> develop
features: /devstarter-knowledge command (SKILL + SDLC, menu item 45) + shared Vault Emit/Recall spec
obsidian: config block (git default, network fallback) + 3 note templates (templates/obsidian/)
emit wired into /devstarter-bug-postmortem + /devstarter-postmortem; recall in /devstarter-debug Phase 1
open_items: Feature shipped opt-in + OFF (obsidian.enabled:false) and NOT exercised end-to-end — disclosed in CHANGELOG v5.7.0 'Known limitation'. Verify against a live vault per docs/obsidian-vault-guide.md.
